steps.t: Elrond can be found in the library of the Last Homely House, in Rivendell.
The course of the Bruinen in the Misty Mountains falls in three levels before it comes out of the mountains. Elrond asked you to fill the cup of Rhuda…
Elrond is in the library of Rivendell.
Elrond is at the Haven of Orladion in Rivendell, north-west of the Last Homely House. You have cleansed the corruption from the Cup of Sacrifice and s…
